title: Campfiring Whips
description: Adds a new class of weapons to the game, whips!
body:
This mod/datapack adds _10 new whips_ to the game. They are medium range precision weapons, where you can only hit entities with the tip of the weapon (e.g. a Flint Whip has a maximum range of 4 blocks and minimum range of 3.2 blocks).

Whip range and damage scale with their tier, meaning that a weaker whip has a _closer minimum range than a stronger one_:

![whips attributes (range and damage)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b8e1680c20b44a73649594fb6af087c73f41f6d.png)
Every whip has the same attack speed of 1 (for comparison, swords have 1.6)

They have 2 new enchantments (together with unbreaking, mending and fire aspect): Juggling and Retreat. The first gives you a chance to throw your _opponent_ into the air, making them easier to combo; the latter throws _you_ back, so you gain space.

Lastly, there are the support whips!

![support whips (ocean, resin, flow and honey whip respectively)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e62f18fbebdcf384805390bfc56368612d10230c.png)

They aren't the strongest whips, but each has a unique use.
- The Ocean Whip gives you **dolphin's grace** and **conduit power**
- The Resin Whip gives you **resistance**
- The Flow Whip gives you **speed** and **jump boost**
- The effects of all of these 3 accumulate duration, from **3s** to **9s**
- The Honey Whip covers hit targets in honey, **slowing** them and nearby entities for **6s**
